Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.RawTemplateDispatcher

Packages that use RawTemplateDispatcher
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.

  • Uses of RawTemplateDispatcher in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view that return RawTemplateDispatcher
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected abstract RawTemplateDispatcher
    ViewResource.dispatcher()
    Returns the per-engine RawTemplateDispatcher this child delegates raw template dispatch to.
    protected abstract RawTemplateDispatcher
    ViewServlet.dispatcher()
    Returns the per-engine RawTemplateDispatcher this servlet delegates raw template dispatch to.

  • Uses of RawTemplateDispatcher in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker that implement RawTemplateDispatcher
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FreemarkerDispatcher
    Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the FreeMarker raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the FreemarkerMixin mixin, the FreemarkerServlet servlet, and the FreemarkerResource child flavors.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected RawTemplateDispatcher
